prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of AON stock, which typically exhibits annual volatility around 25-30%. For a 21-day horizon, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with assumed daily volatility of ~1.6%. The point estimate reflects a slight positive drift based on insurance sector fundamentals. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels to account for increased uncertainty in stock price movements over the 3-week period.
